steps.title: Match the singular temple
steps.content: The blank refers back to "the Salt Lake Temple," a singular noun phrase. The completed sentence needs a singular pronoun and verb to say that the temple was built over forty years.

steps.title: Avoid plural pronouns
steps.content: Choice B creates an unclear reference with "one." Choice C and Choice D use plural pronouns and verbs, but the antecedent is one temple, not multiple structures. A singular subject needs "it was." The answer is A.
